Prefix: CONCEPT:CAMUNDA-*

Concept ID Name Description CONCEPT:CAMUNDA-001 camunda MCP tool domain

docs.title: camunda-mcp Overview
docs.text:
camunda-mcp wraps the Camunda process automation APIs with thin MCP tools, supporting both platforms:

  • Camunda 7 — the Engine REST API (/engine-rest): process definitions, process instances, user tasks, deployments, history, external tasks, messaging, incidents and jobs.
  • Camunda 8 — the Zeebe REST API (/v2), Operate REST API and Tasklist REST API, with optional OAuth client_credentials authentication.

Tools accept a platform argument (7 or 8) so a single server can target either deployment.
